title: Luffy Heads Back to Mock Town
description: Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Sanji, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Bellamy, Luffy. Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: A SLUG! Sprinkle salt on it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Samji! Give it a somersault kick!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Now this is a fine gold statute.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Have the right to touch that gold...!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Is this not enough for ya!?

summary: Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.
